description: Print information about segments. If < range > is not supplied, information for all segments is provided.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Print FISH extra information. A valid integer index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Print comprehensive segment information, which includes: groups, extras, end points IDs, length, zone size, ratio, ratio isolate flag.

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Print information about curve type of the segment and control points.
